input.command: which gemini 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; env | grep -i gemini 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; env | grep -i google 2>/dev/null

content.text:
The `gemini` CLI is installed but broken - it's missing a core module (`gemini-cli-core/dist/src/config/storage.js`). The install is corrupted.

To fix it:
```sh
npm install -g @google/gemini-cli
```

That will reinstall the package and restore the missing file. Once fixed, run:
```sh
gemini -p "hello"
```
